name: gemma-2-9b/reasoning_pack
description: Candidate features for reasoning behaviors in Gemma-2-9B at layer 22 residual. THESE ARE UNVALIDATED PLACEHOLDERS. Run mechreward.features.validator.validate_feature() on each before trusting them as reward components. The feature IDs are drawn from Neuronpedia's published Gemma Scope descriptions and are meant as a starting point, not a definitive catalog.

features.name: step_by_step_marker
features.description: Activates on 'step 1', 'first', 'let me think' and similar sequential reasoning markers.

suggested_positive_examples: Step 1: Let me first identify what's given.
First, I need to check the assumptions.
suggested_negative_examples: Paris is the capital of France.

features.name: arithmetic_operation
features.description: Activates during arithmetic calculations and intermediate results.

features.name: confidence_assertion
features.description: Activates on confident factual claims (no hedging).

features.name: final_answer_marker
features.description: Activates on 'therefore', 'so the answer is', 'final answer'.

metadata.caveat: Feature IDs here are placeholders to illustrate the pack format. Before any serious run, validate each feature via mechreward.features.validator.validate_feature() with a known set of positive and negative examples. See docs/validating_features.md for the workflow.
